posts.author: JRainer741 (Jonah)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

An option to give a column or a group an object name that differs from the label that would show.

What are you trying to achieve

Making it so you can assign an object a name that automations could reference and maintain different labels. Allowing for more robust automations that connect across different boards as well as easier imports from CSV/Excel files without having to change labels to match.
